tool_name: VDI 2230 Bolted Joint — Tightening Torque, Preload Loss & Fatigue Safety Factor

inputs.name: Bolt Nominal Diameter × Pitch (ISO metric)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Nominal/material selection, no measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Bolt Property Class
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Nominal/material selection, no measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Thread & Under-Head Friction Coefficient (μ_total)
inputs.note: VDI 2230 Table A5: dry steel = 0.14–0.18; MoS₂ = 0.06–0.10; zinc-phosphate = 0.09–0.14
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

inputs.name: Bolt Utilisation at Assembly (% of proof load)
Expected Embedding / Relaxation Loss (% of initial preload)
inputs.note: VDI 2230 Table 5: machined surfaces = 5–10%; rough cast = 15–25%; plastic inserter = 20%
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: External Axial Working Load per Bolt (F_A)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Load Introduction Factor (Φ)
inputs.note: VDI 2230 §4.2: concentric bolt through long joint → Φ≈0.1; direct shear plane → Φ≈0.5
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

formulas: const A_s = {M6:20.1, M8:36.6, M10:58.0, M12:84.3, M16:157, M20:245, M24:353, M30:561}[bolt_size]; const Rp02 = {"8.8":640, "10.9":900, "12.9":1080}[property_class]; F_proof_kn = A_s * Rp02 / 1000   // [kN, mm²] Bolt Stress Area & Proof Load Reference: ISO 898-1:2013 — proof load = A_s × Rp0.2
FM_kn = F_proof_kn * utilisation_pct / 100   // [kN] Assembly Preload (F_M) Reference: VDI 2230 §5.3.1 — F_M = R_p0.2 × A_s × ν_A; ν_A = utilisation factor

const d = parseFloat(bolt_size.replace('M','')); const p = {M6:1.0,M8:1.25,M10:1.5,M12:1.75,M16:2.0,M20:2.5,M24:3.0,M30:3.5}[bolt_size]; MA_Nm = FM_kn * 1000 * (p/(2*Math.PI) + mu_friction * d * 0.583 + mu_friction * d * 0.5) / 1000   // [N·m] Tightening Torque (M_A) — Approximate Reference: VDI 2230 Eq.(167) — M_A = F_M(p/2π + μ_G·d_2·0.58 + μ_K·D_Km/2)

FVmin_kn = FM_kn * (1 - preload_loss_pct / 100) - phi_force_ratio * FA_kn   // [kN] Minimum Clamp Force After Embedding (F_Vmin) Reference: VDI 2230 §5.4.1 — F_Vmin = F_M(1-f_Z) - Φ·F_A; f_Z = embedding factor
SA = FVmin_kn / ((1 - phi_force_ratio) * FA_kn)   // [dimensionless] Interface Separation Safety Factor (S_A) Reference: VDI 2230 §5.4.2 — S_A ≥ 1.2 for reliable joint; S_A < 1.0 = joint separates

dFA_kn = phi_force_ratio * FA_kn; sigma_a_mpa = dFA_kn * 1000 / A_s   // [MPa] Bolt Fatigue Stress Amplitude (σ_a) Reference: VDI 2230 §6 — fatigue amplitude σ_a = Φ·F_A/A_s; compare to σ_ASV from Haigh diagram

V1.error_msg: Joint separation: clamp force exhausted by working load — increase preload (larger bolt, higher class), reduce F_A, or increase bolt count

V2.error_msg: Assembly preload exceeds proof load: bolt will yield on tightening — reduce utilisation to max 95% or select 10.9/12.9 class

V3.error_msg: Separation safety factor < 1.2: marginal joint — VDI 2230 minimum S_A = 1.2 for reliable sealing and fatigue resistance

smart_warnings.message: Bolt fatigue amplitude > 50 MPa: high fatigue loading — check against VDI 2230 Haigh diagram; apply thread-rolling (fatigue limit improvement ~30%) or increase bolt diameter
Very low friction coefficient: self-loosening risk in vibration environments — evaluate NORD-LOCK washers or anaerobic adhesive per VDI 2230 §3.5
12.9 class with low friction: hydrogen embrittlement risk in acidic environments — verify plating and service environment compatibility per ISO 4042
High embedding loss (>15%): rough or soft interface — machine mating surfaces or add hardened washer to reduce embedding; re-torque protocol recommended after 48h
Low utilisation (<70%): bolt is underloaded — susceptible to fatigue and loosening; increase preload per VDI 2230 §5.3 or reduce to smaller bolt diameter

fmea.effect: Joint separation: clamp force exhausted by working load — increase preload (larger bolt, higher class), reduce F_A, or increase bolt count
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Assembly preload exceeds proof load: bolt will yield on tightening — reduce utilisation to max 95% or select 10.9/12.9 class
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Separation safety factor < 1.2: marginal joint — VDI 2230 minimum S_A = 1.2 for reliable sealing and fatigue resistance
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

12.9 class with low friction: hydrogen embrittlement risk in acidic environments — verify plating and service environment compatibility per ISO 4042
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: property_class === '12.9' && mu_friction < 0.10

fmea.failureMode: High embedding loss (>15%): rough or soft interface — machine mating surfaces or add hardened washer to reduce embedding; re-torque protocol recommended after 48h
Low utilisation (<70%): bolt is underloaded — susceptible to fatigue and loosening; increase preload per VDI 2230 §5.3 or reduce to smaller bolt diameter
